Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Writ Of Mandate/Alt For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Mar-06-2015 Continued To Apr-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HOWARD J. HIRSCH & ATTY. JOSEPH MAN OF THE LEXINGTON GROUP, TEL. NO. 913-7800 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. GEORGE PRINCE, TEL. NO. 703-5749 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER FOUNDATION AIDING THE ELDERLY'S Motion For Writ Of Mandate Or, In The Alternative, For Declaratory Relief is continued to April 6, 2015. The parties are ordered to meet and confer regarding the outstanding public records act requests, including reproduction of documents or data that may have been produced previously in a format that was not readable. The parties are also to meet and confer on any informal conferences that are still outstanding with respect to the 20 that petitioner referenced in their moving papers. Mr. Hirsch to prepare an order or the parties may submit a joint proposed order. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =(302/SRB)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
